name: chr4_distal_euchromatic
description: chr4 distal 'euchromatic' band (101F-102F cytologically). Despite being decorated by HP1 and HP2 like classical heterochromatin, contains ~80 expressed protein-coding genes (Eyeless, ci, etc.) in a domain heavily marked by H3K9me3. Recombination is essentially zero. Painting of fourth (POF) protein binds chr4-specifically and upregulates these genes.
